  "findings": [
    "Unblocked soffits",
    "Lack of fireblocking at the connection between the horizontal soffit and vertical wall space"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved fireblocking materials to isolate the soffit space from the wall cavity",
    "Re-inspect the fireblocking installation prior to closing up the drywall"
  ],
  "rationale": "The soffits are unblocked, which creates a continuous concealed draft opening between the wall cavity and the soffit space. This violates fireblocking requirements designed to prevent the rapid spread of fire and smoke through concealed spaces.",

    "IRC R302.11",
    "IRC R302.11.1"
  ]
